items.text:
🎻 **CASTING BACKGROUND ARTISTS – SHORT FILM (LA)**

We’re seeking **background performers to portray orchestra musicians** or **audience members** for a short film shooting in Los Angeles.

**ORCHESTRA:**
• Age: 18–35
• All genders and ethnicities encouraged
• Should be able to **convincingly play an orchestral instrument on camera**
• Musicians welcome to bring their instrument for visual realism
• **No music will be performed or recorded** (visual only)

**AUDIENCE:**

• Age: 18+

• All genders and ethnicities encouraged

**Shoot Dates:** April 4–5, 2026 (may work one or both days)
**Location:** Los Angeles
**Union:** SAG-AFTRA Micro-Budget Agreement

**Compensation:**
Meals provided + credit + copy of the film

**To submit:**
Email **[kelleyewerner@gmail.com](mailto:kelleyewerner@gmail.com)** with:

• Name
• Playable age
• Instrument(s) you play (if applicable)
• Phone number
• Photo/headshot
• Availability (April 4 and/or 5)

**Subject line:**
Concerto Background Submission – Your Name + Orchestra OR Audience

items.text:
**Casting Call - EPISODE **

**MARCH 18th, Wednesday**

For a new biographical feature film set in the 1970s, we are looking for **ASIAN MEN aged approx. 20-35, up to 180 cm max., **an athletic build. In role** future MILITARY PERSONNEL**.

**Make-up and possible haircut: March 16th or March 17th**

**Rate: 450 PLN per shooting day**

**Characterization Guidelines:**
* Absolutely no tattoos
* Hair must be short, but cut without the use of hair clipper
* No facial hair (clean-shaven)
* Athletic build

**Please apply to:** **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**
**Subject Line:** **MC 18**
**Email Content:** Name and surname, age, phone number, city/town of residence, nationality + measurements: height, chest, waist, hips, clothing and shoe size.
**Attachment:** **PHOTO OF FACE AND FIGURE: taken only on the day of application + profile photo**

**FACE PHOTO** – portrait selfie in daylight, straight-on, looking into the lens. No filters. No glasses. No head covering. Colourful.
**FIGURE PHOTO** – in clothing that shows the outline of the figure.

items.text:
ZLECENIE DLA AKTORA – KRÓTKIE WYSTĄPIENIE W TV (WARSZAWA) 🧑‍🍳
Poszukujemy charyzmatycznego mężczyzny do krótkiego wystąpienia publicznego w imieniu znanej marki restauracyjnej. Szukamy osoby, która z naturalną swobodą i klasą zaprezentuje markę przed kamerami telewizyjnymi. 

📍 Szczegóły zlecenia:
Termin: 18.03.2026 (środa).

Miejsce: Warszawa.

Czas: Ok. 15 minut (emisja/wystąpienie po godzinie 19:00).

Zadanie: Krótka wypowiedź na temat restauracji (scenariusz i kluczowe informacje ustalone wcześniej z managerem).

Ubiór: Zapewniamy pełny kostium/stylizację po naszej stronie.

👤 Kogo szukamy?
Mężczyzna w wieku 30+ 

Osoba o nienagannej dykcji, swobodnie czująca się przed kamerą.

Doświadczenie w wystąpieniach publicznych lub aktorskie będzie dużym atutem.

📩 Jak się zgłosić?
Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o wiadomość prywatną (Priv) zawierającą:

Kilka słów o swoim doświadczeniu.

Aktualne zdjęcie (twarz + sylwetka).

Numer telefonu do kontaktu.

Proponowaną stawkę za całość zlecenia.

Prosimy o zgłoszenia tylko zdecydowane i dyspozycyjne osoby w podanym terminie 😊

items.text:
To nie jest casting jeśli:
- ktoś prosi Ciebie o nagie zdjęcia, czy też w bieliźnie

- ktoś rozmawia tylko z Tobą, jeśli jesteś osobą niepełnoletnią

Pamiętaj, że takie zdjęcia zostaną gdzieś zapisane. Czasem też pomimo blokady, będzie do Ciebie pisał chcąc „zagrać szantażem” m.in. ściemniając, że włamał Ci się na telefon. Nie ulegaj mu i pamiętaj, że tak, czy inaczej warto powiadomić rodziców, a do tego też i „służby”.

Powiadom też mnie o takiej sytuacji, gdyż jako admin na grupie mam za zadanie dbać m.in. o Twoje bezpieczeństwo. Dostępny jestem na PRIV bądź też pod adresem konorskijan@gmail.com

Do sytuacji, które opisuję może dochodzić nie tylko poprzez FB, ale też pod zewnętrznymi stronami z ogólnodostępnymi castingami. Sprawdzaj wtedy dane agencji, proś o numer telefonu oczekując poddania się weryfikacji, ale nigdy nie wysyłaj w/w zdjęć. Brak odpowiedzi na Twoje pytanie powinno być jednoznaczne dla Ciebie.

Pamiętaj także o grupie https://www.facebook.com/groups/1271416653748731/, gdzie opisywane są historię z w/w epizodami.

@wszyscy

**NATURAL LIGHT HEADSHOTS | NO SESSION FEE | CENTRAL LONDON - LIMITED AVAILABILITY (NEXT 2 WEEKS)**

*Casting-friendly, natural light headshots that actually look like you — cinematic, authentic, and submission-ready*
* Shot by an agency-endorsed photographer with years of experience working with actors, dancers and models, who will provide support and direction to bring out your best.
* No session fee — only invest in the editing (£30/edit*) of what you want to use - weekday morning sessions on location central London.

*Interested - DM here or linked insta below (more work can be seen):*

Headshots - https://www.instagram.com/kensington_portraits/
Fashion - https://www.instagram.com/the_taikan/

*Selection made via contact sheet within a week

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – UNPAID SHORT FILM “GETHSEMANE”**

Good morning all!

I’m a Year 2 Film student from Arts University Plymouth currently casting for a **5-minute experimental psychological short film** about a man trapped in a pressure chamber who must choose between clinging to a haunting love or sacrificing a part of himself to survive.

This is a **minimal-dialogue, visually driven film** inspired by surrealist cinema, relying on physical performance, symbolic movement, and emotional expression.

📍 **Location:** Arts University Plymouth

📅 **Shoot Dates:** 1-2 April

If you’re interested, please **email or DM me** with:

• Name

• Age

• Headshot/photo

• Any acting experience (not required)

Student actors and newcomers are very welcome.

Thank you!

**Subject line:** International Music Video
items.title: **INTERNATIONAL CASTING CALL**

items.text:
“One can’t just shoot anybody on the street!”

 

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text:
Hello everyone!

I'm producing a new online TV show, Lucid Dreams, and we’re on the hunt for some cast members! We’re looking for TWO security guards!

You need to be within TFL serving area (ideally London itself) to minimise travel times.

Date: 15/03
Time: 13:00 (filming to start at 13:30, so on time arrival is imperative)
Loc: NW10 6SJ (full address to be given upon casting for privacy reasons)
Pay: unpaid, but travel is reimbursed.

REQUIRED: The Security guards NEED to be taller than the lead, so you need to be taller than 6 foot. Below is the first episode, and Kevin is the lead.

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVZIiOaDGHy/?igsh=MWJyMGV6dWh5bGpqeg==

Please message me with a showreel/CV if you, or anyone you know, is interested, and I’ll pass it onto the director for discussion.

Thanks! 😊

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.

items.text:
Audition Notice
“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

Auditions: Will be held at Planet Bluegrass Lab Building(Directions), on Friday, Oct 3rd, 5-7pm; Sunday, Oct 5th,  1-3pm and Monday, Oct 6th, 5-7pm  (If none of these days or times work for you, please contact georgi.pollard@gmail.com by Sunday, Oct 5th @12pm

Performance dates:

Friday, December 12th, 2025 @7pm 

Saturday, December 13th, 2025 @2pm & 7pm

Sunday, December 14th, 2025 @2pm 

@Planet Bluegrass Wildflower Pavillion 

All auditioners  will be asked to sing 16 measures from the musical or a verse from a familiar holiday song.

We will dance a few moves and those wanting a speaking role will read from the script. Everyone is encouraged to show off your English accent!  Although not necessary, you are welcome to bring a prepared song to share.  We will have an accompanist.

Roles are Non-Union | Unpaid

LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities all ages to audition, welcoming performers from all backgrounds.

Performers may come on any one of the days or you may sign up using the Signup Genius link

Link to Sign up for an Audition Slot:

SIGN UP LINK

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/70A0A4BA4A723ABFE3-58313489-scrooge#/

“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

items.text:
AUDITIONS FOR THE SULTAN OF SULU 

*We are seeking actors to be in our revival of George Ade's classic comic light opera. Actors of Central Asian and/or Filipino descent are encouraged to audition.*

The Sultan of Sulu, named Ki-Ram, along with his wife, concubines, and his Private Secretary Hadji, get tangled up in the Americans' efforts to bring "democracy" and "civilization" to Sulu, born from the dreaming mind of George Ade.

***Rehearsals***:

*April 4, April 11, May 2, June 20 at 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032 and May 9, May 16, May 23, May 30 at 281 Country Club Rd, Avon, CT 06001*

*Rehearsal Times: Rehearsal Times: 10:30pm to 2:30pm.*

*Performance Date: June 27 (1 pm.)*

*Performance Space: 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032.*

**Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided**

[https://forms.gle/9zJKQNpygPh4L7KRA](https://forms.gle/9zJKQNpygPh4L7KRA?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExTzdoaW1CUTZVWXVCYWFhWHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7-xhsEHfN4XYxX1O3oW215Ys-vatrK3XIbzoLoPKRCv4ErU3O3XgE6IXZu6Q_aem_jKf6dAMx6_-207GyqNJ0dg)

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 40** lat o wzroście 170 - 180  cm, pas 90/100 i **obwód klatki do 90/105cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków** w tym połowa z nich jest z żołnierzami.

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANE PARY DO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO „GRY MAŁŻEŃSKIE”
Stacja Polsat Cafe poszukuje par (małżeństw lub partnerów) do udziału w nowym, lekkim i rozrywkowym programie telewizyjnym „Gry Małżeńskie”.

To format pełen humoru, emocji i dobrej zabawy, w którym relacje między partnerami zostają wystawione na ciekawą próbę. W programie pojawia się bohaterka wcielająca się w rolę detektywa, która rozmawia z trzema mężczyznami i próbuje odgadnąć, który z nich jest prawdziwym singlem. Dwóch z nich jest w związkach, a jeden jest faktycznie wolny.

Jeśli detektywka uzna, że Twój partner jest prawdziwym singlem, Wasza para wygrywa nagrodę główną w wysokości 3000 zł.

Dodatkowo każda para otrzymuje 1200 zł wynagrodzenia za udział w programie.

Informacje organizacyjne:

 • nagrania odbywają się w weekendy (piątek, sobota lub niedziela),

 • udział obejmuje 2 dni zdjęciowe,

 • zwracamy koszty dojazdu,

 • zapewniamy nocleg w hotelu,

 • pracuje mała ekipa, a na planie panuje luźna i przyjazna atmosfera,

 • format ma charakter zabawy i rozrywki- bez scenariusza.

Jeśli macie dystans do siebie, poczucie humoru i chcecie przeżyć ciekawą przygodę telewizyjną- to program dla Was!

Zapraszamy pary, które chcą przeżyć coś nowego, dobrze się bawić i powalczyć o nagrodę. 🎬

message.text:
🎬 DRUGI CASTING W SHALIK STUDIO!

Dla Modeli, Aktorów i Statystów ✌️

Po świetnym odbiorze pierwszego spotkania… czas na kolejną edycję! 🔥
Zapraszamy na drugi casting w Shalik Studio, który odbędzie się:

📅 21 i 22 marca w godzinach od 11 do 18.
📍 ul. Rękawka 10/2, Kraków

Szukamy osób otwartych, kreatywnych, z energią przed kamerą - zarówno z doświadczeniem, jak i tych, którzy dopiero chcą spróbować swoich sił w pracy przed obiektywem 🎥

To przestrzeń do:
– poznania naszego zespołu,
– sprawdzenia się przed kamerą,
– udziału w przyszłych projektach foto i wideo,
– wejścia w świat artystycznych realizacji w klimacie Shalik Studio.

Nie musisz mieć profesjonalnego portfolio — liczy się osobowość, naturalność i gotowość do działania.

📩 Link do zapisów: 

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1qsRCjv2Bp2Qo6lbHZp_VqtyG2Gaqs9py1AeaQMgyeK0/edit?chromeless=1

WAŻNE INFORMACJE 👇👇👇

CZAS
Na każdą osobę przeznaczamy do 10 minut pracy przed kamerą i obiektywem.

KOLEJNOŚĆ WEJŚĆ
Kto pierwszy ten lepszy. Przychodząc do studia zapisujesz się na listę i wchodzisz za jej kolejnością.

CO ROBIMY NA CASTINGU?
 • zdjęcia castingowe (portret + sylwetka)
 • krótka wideo wizytówka na jednolitym tle
 • networking

WIDEO WIZYTÓWKA
 • autoprezentacja (imię, czym się zajmujesz)
 • monolog / improwizacja / performance (krótka forma) Stawiamy na naturalność - nie wymagamy perfekcji ani gotowych ról, aczkolwiek są mile widziane.

 UBIÓR
 • prosto i neutralnie, causal
 • bez dużych napisów i logotypów
 • naturalny makijaż i fryzura

 NA MIEJSCU
 Dostępne będą:
 • kawa
 • herbata
 • woda
 • drobne przekąski

Dlaczego warto dołączyć do naszej bazy?

 a) osoby zapisane w bazie będą w pierwszej kolejności informowane o planowanych projektach (sesje, filmy, reklamy, teledyski, eventy),

 b) stała zniżka -20% na wynajem studia pod własne projekty i wydarzenia,

 c) przy większych realizacjach pomagamy w pozyskiwaniu dofinansowań na projekty artystyczne i filmowe,

 d) współpraca długofalowa – nie jednorazowy casting.

Dobrego dnia! 😉

items.text:
[CASTING/CREW CALL][LA] “THE PERFECT SHOT” — A Rom-Com Short Film / El Segundo / SMC / UCLA

**Logline:** A pretentious film student, struggling to find his "authentic voice," discovers his muse (and his cluelessness) when he is forced to partner with a bubbly theatre girl for a class project.

CREW CALL: DP, 1st AC, and PA’s

CASTING CALL: Extras, 18-25

COMPENSATION: Crew  based on experience level. 

CONTACT: [Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com](mailto:Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com) 

Hello world! 

I’m a student director putting together a passion project short film this month, and I’m looking for a few key crew members to help bring this silly little rom-com to life. This is funded by ourselves (feeding crew, credit, portfolio fuel, and good vibes), but the locations are locked and the script is tight.

**The Vibe:** Think (500) Days of Summer meets the awkward sincerity of a Wes Anderson student film. It’s a funny, sweet, low-stakes story about how artists sometimes need to get out of their own heads.

**Shoot Dates:** [TBD, Prospective: March 20-23 or March 27-30th] (1-2 weekend days, plus potential pickup day)
**Locations:** El Segundo / UCLA Campus / Santa Monica College Campus

**We are currently looking for:**
* Director of Photography (DP):

Someone who loves natural light and can handle a mix of interior dialogue scenes and fun, energetic exterior walking shots. We have a specific look in mind (warm, slightly contrasty) and would like a collaborator, someone with some knowledge and perspective, but doesn't need to be an expert. We have a scene shot up in the catwalks over the main stage at SMC, so **must be okay with heights.** We may also get access to the light board to shoot some lights up into the catwalk to assist our own lighting in the scene, so a huge opportunity to experiment with both theatre and film lights to shape the look of our scenes.
* 1st AC: Need someone reliable to keep us on schedule, our image in focus, and our set transitions tight. We will likely be shooting on a mirrorless system (Sony/FX series) OR A BMPCC 6K. 
* Production Assistants (PA’s):** Eager to learn? Need set experience? This is a chill set with a small crew. Your main jobs will be crowd control at public locations, wrangling gear, and craftys/snacks.

**Special Shout-out to Santa Monica College Students:**

If you are currently at **SMC** (or know someone who is) and are an actor looking for on-set experience, **PLEASE reach out.** We are filming a key scene at the SMC Performing Arts Center and would love to populate the background with real students to make the world feel authentic.

**Compensation:** **Credit, Digital Copy, Meals/Snacks, and my undying gratitude.** This is a student/independent project intended for festival submission and portfolio reels. Open to discussion to pay DP, AC and Sound, so don't hesitate to ask! **Just a heads up that this budget is pretty stark, so nothing over $500 please. **Once we get the big bucks, we'll be more than happy to accommodate your expertise :)

**To Apply:**

Please DM me with your role of interest and a link to your portfolio/reel or IG. If you're an SMC actor, just send a headshot or a selfie and tell me your availability.

Let's make something fun!

items.text:
We are casting a series of fast-paced, 30-second (UNPAID) STUDENT PROJECT Specsaver adverts paying homage to the legendary, culturally iconic "Should've gone to..." advertising campaign. This project is all about visual humour, oblivious confidence, and impeccable comedic timing.

We are looking for actors who excel at deadpan delivery and physical comedy. If you can play a character who is hilariously, confidently, and completely wrong about their surroundings, we want to see you!

We will cover meals and drinks as well as travel (Within the merseyside area)

filmed on high quality professional equipment as well as a professional environment and crew

This project will provide you with:
-Showreel footage material
-On-screen credits
-acting experience with a professionally run student production

IF INTERESTED MESSAGE ME PRIVATELY OR APPLY ON OUR MANDY 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3113999/specsaver-ads/

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April.

Sophia/Soni (22-35) Strong and confident, sassy, eloquent, bold, and can be impulsive. **Any ethnicity.** She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April.

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. **Any ethnicity**. Shoot on 12th April.

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Girlfriend- 23-35, Any ethnicity.

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April.

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

topComments.text: I sent an email. Looking forward to hearing back.
Are u accepting resumes from people with no acting experience ?

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING: The project is called Easy Money. We have actors that have worked on Avatar: The Last Airbender, Fire Country, and Mulan to name a few. Our DOP has done camera work on The Good Doctor. This is an independently funded project, so the actors will not be paid. We are going through the union under ULB. Please DM me your headshot, demo reel, resume, and socials. Only potential candidates will be contacted. Actors will receive footage and IMDB credit. 

Ryan 
Age: 30-50
Gender: Male
Description:
He is a businessman. Think The Wolf of Wall Street. He does blow to keep his energy up throughout the day.

Helen
Age: 40-58
Gender:  Female
Description:
By day, she is a bus driver, and by night, she gets high on crack.

Alisha
Age: 25-35
Gender: Female
Description: She is a sex worker who does heroin. She offers a sexual favor to Alex in exchange for drugs.

Gurvinder
Age: 25-40
Gender: Male
Description:
We are looking for an East Indian or someone who can play that. He is from Surrey and was a former high school soccer player. He is an obnoxious character. Very arrogant. He likes to party hard on the weekends by drinking Crown and snorting coke with his homies.

topComments.text: You get what you pay for

items.text:
Casting Call for Asian Actresses for Live Entertainment

Actresses to portray the Huntrix characters from KPop Demon Hunters for live events (festivals, birthday parties, corporate events). $150 + an hour, plus travel fees. Ongoing and will work with your schedule.

We can provide the costumes. Singing and/or dancing a plus, but not required at all. You just need to be outgoing and enjoy working with kids. Pale skin, petite feature and size 2-4.

Tattoos are typically problematic, but we can work with some depending on the location on the body, which character you are doing and if they can be covered with water / smudge proof make-up.

Non smoker with a car is a must.

We will work with your schedule, but Saturday late morning through late afternoon is the most requested time frame.

Please email us candid photos (head shots - smiling and non and full body shots) to dreamfriendevents@gmail.com

thanks!

Kester

[https://www.instagram.com/dfe_and_media](https://www.instagram.com/dfe_and_media?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExTXpJVjliQkc4SUhlbXZLdHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7cPrYNEUXUiknpWziH6JsFrCVOh1JZ658DrW7ckLIxswyZeHI-hZVyqVJJBw_aem_RDuM7nJ61d_s84l5BP20SA)

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – FAULTLINE (Short Film)**  
**URGENT: Casting Midlands-based actors for late‑March shoot**

Hi everyone, I’m a final-year Film Production student at the University of Derby, urgently casting for my graduation short film *Faultline* - a gritty coming-of-age drama set in 1980s Derby. The story follows a troubled teenage boy torn between gang loyalty and the last person fighting for him: his grandmother.

We are looking for Midlands-based actors for several lead, supporting, and extra roles, with self-tapes needed as soon as possible.

**Project type:** Student short film
**Filming locations:** Stoke & surrounding Midlands areas
**Shoot period:** End of March : 22nd to 28th

Roles available:

 

**SCOTT (Playing age 16–21)**
A tough, emotionally guarded Midlands teenager drawn into the skinhead scene. Beneath the bravado, he’s vulnerable and conflicted, forced to choose between loyalty to his gang or a chance at redemption.
**Note:** Actor must be comfortable shaving their head on screen for one scene.

**SI / HENNO / SHAW / DAZ (Playing age 16–21)**
Members of a local skinhead gang. Intimidating, confrontational, and deeply loyal to their group.

**Note:** Actors must be comfortable shaving their heads for the role.

**JUNE (Playing age 65–75)**
Scott’s grandmother. Warm, gentle, and quietly resilient, she offers unconditional love and becomes the last person truly fighting for Scott’s future.

 

Please note:

This is a low-budget student production, so unfortunately we are unable to offer payment. However, all travel expenses will be covered, and food will be provided on shoot days.

 

Auditions will be self-tape, with shortlisted actors invited to an in-person call-back in Derby.

 

If you’re interested, please email: saskianatalyafilms@outlook.com where you will be able to receive the full casting call for character breakdowns and submission details.

 

Thank you so much - and please feel free to share with anyone who might be interested!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎FAULT LT I ع - E COMING COMINGSOON SOON A SHORT DRAMAFILM FILM‎'‎

items.text:
Now Hiring Teaching Artists
Do you love sharing your creative skills with others? Future Hearts, Minds & Dreamers (FHMD) is looking for passionate teaching artists to lead arts enrichment workshops for youth and seniors in communities across the country, both in person and online.

We are currently seeking instructors in areas such as:

Dance • Yoga • Photography • Film • Theatre • Creative Writing • Visual Arts • Culinary Arts • Language Arts • Martial Arts • and more.

About the role

Teach engaging arts classes for ages 2 through 50+

Sessions typically run 6–10 weeks, meeting once per week

Classes are 45–60 minutes long

Flexible scheduling — great for working artists

Pay: $40–$60 per class

Our teaching artists are working professionals who are passionate about guiding the creative growth of students through hands-on exploration, practical knowledge, and self-reflection. Instructors may teach from our existing class offerings or design their own classes.

FHMD programs operate across the U.S., including California, Colorado, Arizona, Texas, Florida, New York, Washington D.C., and many more states.

Requirements

Experience teaching in your artistic field

Reliable transportation

Ability to provide materials, a materials list, or a materials fee

This is a great opportunity for creative professionals looking for flexible teaching opportunities between projects, productions, or other work.

Send your resume to: fhmd@fhmdfhmd.com

Learn more: fhmdfhmd.com/now-hiring

Future Hearts, Minds & Dreamers is committed to building an inclusive community where diverse perspectives and creative voices are valued.

items.text:
Howdy y’all, this fall I’m directing a western short film that’ll be put into festivals and am beginning to cast the lead four!

Contact me via facebook messenger, please and thank you!

Location: Atlanta, Georgia
Genre: Western
When: Early to Mid September, 2026
Schedule: Five Day Shooting, Two Days Wardrobe/ Make Up Rehearsal 
Rates: $150/ Day for Rehearsal, $250/ Day for Filming (Negotiable based on experience, lodging can be provided for those out of state)
Note: All roles have slight bit of prop weapon work involved (notes attached to each character)

Below are descriptions of the husband (protagonist), Morgan (antagonist), and Bill (antagonist). I am already in talks with someone for the lead actress. 

Woman: Mid to Late 20’s. Confident, outspoken, intelligent, determined. A stoic settler who moved from the north down south after the war, raised to be self sufficient as well as kind. Knows when to talk just as well as she does when to stay quiet, and is never one to let her mind go unspoken. A calm, clean, and silent figure unlike the western world around her. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows, Revolver
Character Influences: Harmonica (Once Upon a Time in the West), Douglas Mortimer (For a Few Dollars More), Rain (Alien: Romulus),  Ellie (The Last of Us: Part II)

Husband: Mid to Late 20’s. Kind, gentle natured, war-worn. A former Union soldier turned sheriff before his retiring to the peaceful country life he imagined with his wife. 
Weapon(s): Bow and Arrows
Character Inspirations: Atticus Finch (To Kill a Mockingbird), Paul Edgecomb (The Green Mile)

Morgan: Late 30’s to Early 40’s, Caucasian male. Tall, lean/ lanky, sharp features, a plus if you can pull off a sharp gaze/ squint. Calculating, cunning, known for putting up a gentle act to hide dark natures of his own intentions. A former confederate soldier who lost his family home during the Civil War, now turning to crime and on the run with his partner, another former confederate soldier named Bill who he treats like a sidekick to be used as a tool. Lived a once privileged life, and now wishes to do anything to return to it. 
Weapon(s): Rifle
Character Inspirations: Angel Eyes (The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly), Anton Chigurh (No Country for Old Men), Commodus (Gladiator)

Bill: Mid to Late 30’s, Caucasian male. Burly, former boxer type of build gone softer. Reluctant, gentle, one track mind type of person. Former soldier who became a boxer after the war when his farm was burned down, taken in by Morgan who he sees as his guide through this post war life of his. Isn’t particularly a fan of his criminal life, but is lingering on the fading hope that he can go back to his farmer life one day. 
Weapon(s): Revolver, Knife
Character Inspirations: Fezzik (The Princess Bride), The Monster (Frankenstein)

topComments.text: Are you looking for crew? I’m happy to serve as a PA or anywhere else on set I can be of service!
I’m 28 and also an actor, if you could send me some more info to audition I’m interested in the role of the husband

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

**Sesje tematyczne w Gliwicach z gadżetami i kostiumami!**

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

 

- Kobieta mafii 1930

- wojenna partyzantka z 1940

- Wampirzyca

- Kapłanka egipska 

- Piratka

- Sensualne

- klasyczne

- Wiedzma

- Lara Croft

 

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.summary:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Tomorrow night we finally premiere our latest promo for Kick Ass Film Fest. 

Doors open at 6:30pm at Cottonwood Center For the Arts. Other local filmmakers will be showing their films as well.

sharedPost.text:
The official poster for our Blood and Water 007 promo is finally here! A huge shoutout to Jacob Rivera for the sexy design and a massive thank you to our phenomenal cast and crew—your tireless hard work made this vision a reality. We are so proud to share this project with the Kick Ass Film Fest community and celebrate the local talent that brought it to life.

Join us for the official premiere tomorrow, March 11th, at 6:30 PM at the Cottonwood Center for the Arts. They will also be showcasing several other incredible short films from talented local filmmakers, so come out and celebrate the entire local film scene on the big screen! For those who can’t make it in person, Blood and Water will be officially released online this Monday, March 16th. We can’t wait to see you there!

#kickassfilmfest #coloradofilm #jamesbond #film #filmfestival

items.text:
Are you an aspiring actor or filmmaker looking to unleash your talent? We invite you to be part of our dynamic collective! Every Saturday, in Los Angeles we come together to collaborate and bring our cinematic visions to life, creating one high-quality movie each month. Our diverse group includes not just actors, but also passionate writers, skilled DOPs, talented production designers, prop masters, directors, and more. With access to fantastic locations, top-notch equipment, and an enthusiastic crew, we are dedicated to crafting movies that are not only of exceptional quality but also ready for the festival circuit. Become a part of a supportive community where your creativity can flourish!

If you're available and want to join a group of talented and passionate filmmakers, complete this form. https://forms.gle/zd737XUMFmhbXEQt8

Hello! My name is Juniellia and I am a dancer/actress/director from NY/NJ looking to FINALLY produce and direct a film I wrote a few years ago. It’s a psychological drama with 1-3 locations, two of which can be worked around! There’s also just about 3 characters with lines and a few background, can still be worked around!

If anyone has any pointers for next steps or tips for the journey, would love to listen! 

(& also will be located in Cali until end of May, if anyone wants to help get it filmed while out here! suuuuuper open to making those connections 🙂

please comment or message me. thank you and I look forward to hearing y’all out 🫶🏽

topComments.text: The best advice I can give you is to raise money to produce your film, people look past that when it is, one of the most important steps if you want to do it right
In San Diego if you need anything!

My name is Anyiah, and I am a graduate student at the USC School of Cinematic Arts as well as the writer and director of the upcoming MFA short film *The Exchange.* I am currently looking for **LA-based actors and crew members** to join the project.

**Shooting dates:** April 4th – 6th and April 11th – 12th.

Please see the graphic for more details about the film. If you are interested in **auditioning or joining the crew**, please scan the QR code in the graphic or complete the appropriate Google interest form using the links below. Additional information about the film, production details, and audition or crew requirements can be found in the forms.

Please note that this is an **unpaid opportunity due to school requirements.**

The interest forms are due **March 22nd at 11:59 PM.**

items.text:
# **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.
items.title: # **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

items.text:
CASTING CALL: *The Classic Frenemy* (4 min Drama)

Simon Fraser University Surrey Campus 
| 250 - 13450 -102 Avenue
 

Shooting Date: 

March 19th (Thu) 3:00 PM-7PM (flexible shifts ok) 

Meeting Location:  

- Third floor, opposite the library when exiting the elevator — in the seating area behind the partition wall that includes the microwave and handwashing station.

Filming Location Note:  

- Filming will primarily take place in the third-floor hallway opposite the library (from the elevator direction) and in the seating area behind the partition wall with the microwave and handwashing station. A portion of the scene will also be filmed on the second floor, in the main seating and table area.

Compensation: 

- Digital copy
- Credit 
- Reel footage

Logline: 

- When a meticulous clever student   named Character 1 catches her jealous classmate Character 2 sabotaging her assignments, she sets a clever trap to expose and get revenge.

CASTING 2 Female Actors (18+, college age):  

Character 1: A committed student who consistently get A’s.   

Character 2: A student who is jealous of Character 1 since she believes getting an A is impossible. 

Supplies (Please bring if you have it; we'll provide otherwise):

- Bring either a binder or notebook with written notes 

-2 fake quiz sheets with one marked in A and one in B. It can either be a quiz with questions with grades drawn on it or two pieces of quiz report with those grade written on it. E.g without questions but rather a large title indicating Quiz 1 and in the bottom of the title it says grade:———. *But keeping it simple works.

- Laptop with Google Classroom open

Costume Required: 

- Completely opposite-colored outfits (including sleeves) — e.g., one wearing green/ one wearing red, blue/pink — to give a very clear picture on which character is which between the two characters. 

- Please bring glasses if you are Character 1 (your own or decorative/fake pair)

Project Members: Susan Song, Ben Liu, Ben Park

Post Sent By Susan Song 

Contact: 

- 778-723-9578

- ssa705@sfu.ca

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – JOHANNESBURG / PRETORIA ACTORS 🎬
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short-form comedy web series called Anomalies Anonymous.

👻 Anomalies Anonymous is a mockumentary-style comedy about supernatural beings attending a support group to deal with the challenges of living among humans.

The series follows characters like a fruitarian vampire, a vegan werewolf, a gorgon who struggles with eye contact, a dragon with anger issues, and a ghost who accidentally scares people.

📍 Details:

• Independent short-form comedy series

• Episodes approx. 1 minute long (for social media)

• Filming in Johannesburg / Pretoria

• Unpaid passion project

• Great opportunity for showreel footage and comedic material

🎭 Characters:

🧛 Popovici – vampire

🐺 Gregory – werewolf

🐍 Elena – gorgon

🐉 Iggy – dragon

👻 Sipho – ghost

👤 Daniel – invisible man (voice role)

📩 Interested?

Email me for the audition packet and sides:

caraleanespence17@gmail.com

Feel free to share with actors who might be interested!

✨ Looking forward to hearing from you!

items.text: Hello. My name is Vincent and I am very much interested in acting in TV shows, commercials and or movies so if there is any directors or producers that are in need of actors then I am your guy. I am very talented I can memorize movies and play the part from beginning to end. I'm very good at impressions and good at singing. So if there is any tips on how I can get into acting roles please just comment on the post. I gladly appreciate it alot

topComments.text: How do you know if you’re a very talented actor if you’ve never done it? First of all get a little more humble. Overselling yourself never works.

Im going to tell you start off doing background. I moved up to principal roles in some major films and I start out doing one background job and was pulled for a roll now acted with credits in about 12 movies and TV shows and it’s only been two years. It’s now a full time job. Check out my IMBD page. Daniel Congleton It can be done

Actors: If anyone is wanting or needing updated headshots, we’d love to have you on Saturday April 4th! Looking forward to seeing everyone who has already joined. Click here to get on the list: https://partiful.com/e/kXRmHMVwJepKae75gouV?c=mPof4hl7 

We’ve loved hearing your experiences from the last event. We’re excited to help you land your next role.
items.previewDescription: The next headshot party is here! All photos are downloadable and shareable via galley link listed below. ...

items.text:
🎬😂 CALLING ALL ACTORS & FILMMAKERS – READY FOR A WEEKEND OF PREMIERE FILM SCREENINGS; WORKSHOPS; NETWORKING; Q&As….and LAUGHS?

The Funny Life Film Festival is back NEXT WEEKEND

📅 Friday 20th & Saturday 21st March 2026

📍 Collective Studio, Islington, London 

✨ Comedy Short Film Programmes

items.text:
# CASTING CALL – STUDENT GRADUATION FILM

Project Title: *Sanctuary*
Production: Graduation short film for Wiltshire College & University Centre

Logline:
A quiet young woman struggling with isolation in her daily life encounters a small moment of creativity that sparks a sense of reflection and possibility.

Style & Inspiration:
The project is a 5–10 minute experimental short film exploring themes of nostalgia, growing up, and the quiet emotional moments of adulthood. The film is inspired by the visual and tonal style of All About Lily Chou-Chou and Chungking Express.

## ROLES

**LUNA (Lead)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A quiet and introspective young woman navigating feelings of loneliness and emotional distance in her everyday life. Much of the performance will rely on subtle expression and physical acting rather than dialogue.

Key Scenes:
• Workplace isolation among coworkers
• A reflective journey on public transport
• A late-night walk leading to a mysterious discovery

Notes:
Comfortable performing subtle, introspective moments with minimal dialogue.

_______________________

**ANGEL (Supporting)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A supporting presence connected to Luna’s emotional journey. The role helps shape the tone and emotional contrast within the story.

EXPERIENCE

Actors of **any experience level are welcome to apply**. This project is open to students, emerging actors, and performers building their showreel.

SHOOT DETAILS

Location:
Filming will take place across locations between Salisbury and Bournemouth, with most scenes shot around Salisbury.

Shoot Dates:
Expected shooting window:
Week of 23rd March – 29th March 2026
Plus one/two additional shoot day(s) in April 2026 (exact date to be confirmed).

**COMPENSATION**

These roles are unpaid. However, the production will provide:

• Food during shoot days
• Travel reimbursement
• Accommodation if required
• Showreel footage from the finished film

**TO APPLY**

Please apply through Mandy (linked below):

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)

Subject line:
“Sanctuary Casting – [Role Name]”

Submission deadline: 21st March

Selected applicants may be asked to submit a short self-tape or attend a brief audition.

Director / Production Team: Joanna Kucharska/Adam Carr/David Glukh
Final year student filmmakers at Wiltshire College & University Centre as part of Bournemouth University, creating a graduation short film.

[[https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.text:
**CALLING FILMMAKERS & CREATIVES** 🎬

I’m looking to collaborate with talented people in film for **both paid and unpaid opportunities** as we continue building and expanding our productions.

We’re currently open to connecting with:
• **Producers**
• **Directors**
• **Camera Crew**
• **Lighting Crew**
• **Sound / Audio**
• **Make Up Artists**
• **Anyone working in film who wants to collaborate**

We already have a solid team in place, but we’re **always open to expanding our network** and working with passionate creatives. Some projects are **paid**, while others are **collaborative as we raise funds for bigger productions**.

If you’re interested in **building, creating, and growing together**, feel free to **inbox me** and let’s talk.

🎥 Let’s make something great.

items.text:
During COVID I read 2,000+ scripts for the Black List and Austin Film Festival.
Only seven stood out. One never left me.
🎬 Potential Lionsgate theatrical distribution attached through my mentor (6% residual participation) if the film remains substantially faithful to the script (~80%) and preserves the integrity of the protagonist.
Story:
A troubled biracial teenage girl falls obsessively in love with a white parolee trying not to return to prison
Her devotion both saves him and destroys him, making her both the protagonist and antagonist.
Tone: Silver Linings Playbook × Precious
⚖️ The writer is currently incarcerated in an Oregon penitentiary for a crime he claims he didn’t commit.
🎬 Serious producers/directors interested in a strong festival and theatrical drama — DM me.
Enclosed Concept poster for the upcoming indie drama "Blind Can’t Hear."

items.summary:
During COVID I read 2,000+ scripts for the Black List and Austin Film Festival.
Only seven stood out. One never left me.
🎬 Potential Lionsgate theatrical distribution attached through my mentor (6% residual participation) if the film remains substantially faithful to the script (~80%) and preserves the integrity of the protagonist.
Story:
A troubled biracial teenage girl falls obsessively in love with a white parolee trying not to return to prison
Her devotion both saves him and destroys him, making her both the protagonist and antagonist.
Tone: Silver Linings Playbook × Precious
⚖️ The writer is currently incarcerated in an Oregon penitentiary for a crime he claims he didn’t commit.
🎬 Serious producers/directors interested in a strong festival and theatrical drama — DM me.
Enclosed Concept poster for the upcoming indie drama "Blind Can’t Hear."

Enclosed Concept poster for the upcoming indie drama "Blind Can’t Hear."

CASTING CALL – MALE MODELS / ACTORS (LOS ANGELES)
Casting 18–30 year old male models or actors for a fashion/editorial photoshoot taking place in Los Angeles on April 26. It is a paid opportunity.

Project details:

• Editorial-style fashion shoot inspired by athletic / collegiate themes  

• Locker room / sports environment aesthetic  

• Models must be comfortable posing in athletic wear (football uniforms, gym attire, etc.)  

• Some scenes may include close interaction between male models

Shoot info:

• Date: April 26  

• Location: Los Angeles area (exact location provided upon booking)  

• Duration: Approximately 3–4 hours  

• This is a creative editorial project with an experienced photographer and creative team

For more inquiries please message me.

items.text:
Looking for an older man (60–80) for a quick spec ad shoot today in Brooklyn 🎥
I’m a Brooklyn-based cinematographer working on a short spec commercial and need someone who can play an older gentleman reading a newspaper on a park bench. The vibe is calm, cinematic, and natural — think quiet morning in the park.

Details:

• Brooklyn location (park setting)  

• Very small crew  

• Simple scene (sitting on a bench, reading newspaper)  

• Shoot time: ~1–2 hours  

• Today  

• Non-union / spec project  

No acting experience required — just looking for someone with a great character look.

If interested, please DM me with a photo and availability today 📩

Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)

items.text:
Teamwork makes the dream work.
I am starting a production company that will make films grounded in realism, depth and human nature.

I am looking for other passionate filmmakers who want to create something great. I am basing my model on everyone involved in the film has an equal share in it. Too many production companies prey on upcoming actors and crew, using them and keeping all the credit and profits to themselves. Getting enough of us together, we can say no thanks, we're making our own films as a team, with enough talented individuals putting in the time and work together, we can do great things and make great films. 

Looking for actors, DOPs, sound engineers, producers, editors, assistants and everything in-between who want to be involved in starting this production company together. 

Let's build something amazing and make some great films.

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.text:
🎭 Actors Wanted for Murder Mystery Nights! 🔎
I’m looking for actors/performers who would like to build their portfolio and gain live performance experience to take part in an interactive Murder Mystery Night event running twice a month.

🕵️ What it involves:• Playing a suspect in a live interactive murder mystery• Engaging with guests, answering questions, and staying in character• Working alongside other actors to bring the story to life

⏰ Time commitment:• Approximately 5 hours per event• Events will run twice per month

🍽️ What you’ll get:• Food provided on the night• A chance to gain live acting experience• Opportunity to build your performance portfolio• Potential for paid opportunities in the future depending on how the events grow

This is a great opportunity for drama students, aspiring actors, improv performers, or anyone who enjoys character acting.

If you’re interested, comment below or send me a message with:• Your name• Any acting/improv experience (not required)• A short intro about yourself

Feel free to tag anyone who might be interested!

topComments.text: Unpaid work…… again. These posts need binning.

items.text:
**Casting Call - EPISODE **

**MARCH 18th, Wednesday**

For a new biographical feature film set in the 1970s, we are looking for **ASIAN MEN aged approx. 20-35, up to 180 cm max., **an athletic build. In role** future MILITARY PERSONNEL**.

**Make-up and possible haircut: March 16th or March 17th**

**Rate: 450 PLN per shooting day**

**Characterization Guidelines:**
* Absolutely no tattoos
* Hair must be short, but cut without the use of hair clipper
* No facial hair (clean-shaven)
* Athletic build

**Please apply to:** **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**
**Subject Line:** **MC 18**
**Email Content:** Name and surname, age, phone number, city/town of residence, nationality + measurements: height, chest, waist, hips, clothing and shoe size.
**Attachment:** **PHOTO OF FACE AND FIGURE: taken only on the day of application + profile photo**

**FACE PHOTO** – portrait selfie in daylight, straight-on, looking into the lens. No filters. No glasses. No head covering. Colourful.
**FIGURE PHOTO** – in clothing that shows the outline of the figure.

WARSAW 18.03.2026 Rate: 450 PLN per shooting day Check the post for details! send applications to: Ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl Ewelina.w POD1 TYTUŁEM'

CASTING WARSZAWA – 23.03.2026

Kampania społeczna 1,5% dla Małych Braci Ubogich

Projekt pro bono (bez wynagrodzenia) – udział w ważnej kampanii społecznej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Bródno
📅 Zdjęcia: 23 marca 2026

Szukamy:

Nastolatki (3 osoby)
wiek 16–18 lat, dziewczyny i chłopcy.
Klimat fajnych dzieciaków z osiedla, które spotykają się na ławce / murku pod blokiem.
Jedna z osób (chłopak) powinna mieć swobodę aktorską.

Chłopiec (1 osoba)
wiek 10–12 lat.
Trochę rozrabiaka, charakterystyczny, zadziorny.
Duża lekkość w graniu emocji.

⸻

📩 Zgłoszenia:
impresariat.cametstudio@gmail.com

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do końca dzisiejszego dnia - 13.03.26 piątek 

Wybrane osoby otrzymają krótkie scenki do nagrania.
Prosimy o odesłanie nagrania w linku do prywatnego YouTube do:

⏰ 14 marca do godz. 12:00
